Back to platform
CometCloud AI · Looloomi

Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 27, 2026  ·  Jurisdiction: Hong Kong SAR

1. Information We Collect

CometCloud AI collects minimal data necessary to operate its services. Specifically:

  • API usage logs (anonymized request metadata, no personal identifiers)
  • No personal data is required to access the MCP server or REST API endpoints
  • Email address, only if voluntarily submitted via the contact form
  • Wallet address, only if you initiate a wallet connection within the platform (optional)

2. How We Use Data

Data collected is used exclusively for the following purposes:

  • Service operation and reliability monitoring
  • Abuse detection and rate-limit enforcement
  • Aggregate analytics — tool invocation counts, endpoint usage patterns

We do not sell, rent, or share personal data with third parties for commercial purposes. Aggregate, non-identifiable analytics may be used internally for product development.

3. AI and Agent Data

Queries made via the MCP server, REST API, or WebSocket endpoints are logged at the infrastructure level for service reliability and debugging. Logs are anonymized and rotated on the schedule described in Section 4.

No query content — including asset inquiries, CIS score requests, or signal feed queries — is used to train machine learning models, shared with model providers, or retained beyond the log retention period.

4. Data Retention

  • API and access logs — 90 days, then automatically purged
  • CIS score history — retained indefinitely as aggregate market data; not linked to individual users
  • Contact form submissions — retained until you request deletion
  • Wallet connection sessions — session tokens expire within 24 hours; no private key data is ever stored

5. Third-Party Services

CometCloud AI relies on the following infrastructure providers. Each processes data subject to their own privacy policies:

Railway Application hosting and deployment Privacy policy ↗
Supabase Score history database Privacy policy ↗
Upstash Redis caching layer Privacy policy ↗

6. Your Rights

Under the Hong Kong Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (PDPO Cap. 486), you have the right to:

  • Request access to any personal data we hold about you
  • Request correction of inaccurate personal data
  • Request deletion of personal data, including contact form submissions and wallet session records

To exercise any of these rights, email jazz@cometcloud.ai with the subject line "Data Request". We will respond within 14 days.

7. Compliance Notice

CometCloud AI does not hold a Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) Type 4 (Advising on Securities) or Type 9 (Asset Management) license. The platform provides market intelligence data and CIS scoring for informational purposes only. Nothing on this platform constitutes investment advice.

Data handling practices are designed to be consistent with the Hong Kong Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (PDPO Cap. 486).

8. Contact

Questions or concerns regarding this policy:

Email: jazz@cometcloud.ai
CometCloud AI · Hong Kong SAR
